spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Mobile-First Swiss Grid, Hard Edges

component_styling.button_primary: bg-primary flex-row justify-center items-center px-6 py-4 rounded-none border-2 border-border active:opacity-80
component_styling.input: bg-background border-2 border-border p-4 text-base font-medium rounded-none text-text_primary
component_styling.bottom_nav: bg-background border-t-2 border-border py-4 px-6 flex-row justify-between items-center
component_styling.drawer: bg-surface w-4/5 h-full border-r-2 border-border p-6
component_styling.badge_present: bg-success px-2 py-1 border border-border rounded-none
component_styling.badge_absent: bg-danger px-2 py-1 border border-border rounded-none
component_styling.badge_late: bg-warning px-2 py-1 border border-border rounded-none

onboarding.layout: Full screen background image with heavy overlay (bg-black/60). Stark white massive typography (H1). Role selection buttons (Admin, Trainer, Student) stacked vertically with high contrast.
onboarding.interactions: Google Sign-in button prominently displayed. Fade-in stagger for role buttons.

dashboard_admin.layout: Bento grid approach. Top: High contrast KPI cards (Overall Attendance %, Total Revenue). Middle: Scrollable list of Centers/Trainers. Bottom: Feedback trend mini-chart.
dashboard_admin.features: Multi-center toggle in the header. Hard borders separating sections.

dashboard_trainer.layout: Control room style. Top: Today's Schedule (Hero block). Middle: Quick actions (Mark Attendance, Collect Payment). Bottom: Students list with recent feedback.
dashboard_trainer.features: Attendance summary progress bar with sharp edges.

dashboard_student.layout: Personalized, clear. Top: Attendance streak (Massive number). Middle: Next session details. Bottom: Payment status (Due/Paid) in high-contrast alert box.
dashboard_student.features: QR Code / PIN entry button highly prominent for self-attendance.

attendance_marking.layout: List view. Each row has student name and 3 sharp toggle buttons (P, A, L). Bulk action 'Mark All Present' floating at bottom.
attendance_marking.features: Swipe left to mark absent, swipe right for present.

payments.layout: Subscription plan cards with heavy borders. Payment history as a dense data table. 'Pay via Stripe' primary CTA.

feedback.layout: Post-session rating. Huge star icons. Categorized sliders (Quality, Punctuality). Text area for comments.

scheduling.layout: Calendar view. Hard-lined grid for days. Sessions appear as color-coded blocks (no rounded corners).
scheduling.features: Tap day to expand sessions in a bottom sheet.

profile.layout: Header with avatar. Dense list of info (Age, Goals, Credentials). Language switcher (English/Tamil) toggle prominent.

onboarding_background.description: Male and female fitness trainers posing in a modern gym setting

student_placeholder.description: Boy in black hoodie sitting on chair

trainer_placeholder.description: A man and a woman working out in a gym

micro_interactions.hover_active: Scale down slightly (scale-95) on press. Background color darkens.
micro_interactions.toast_notifications: Hard-edged toast sliding from top with a stark black/white contrast.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use React Native + Expo with NativeWind (Tailwind for React Native) for styling.
Implement light and dark themes using NativeWind's dark mode capabilities.
Do not use generic font 'Inter' for headings. Configure 'Outfit' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text via expo-font.
CRITICAL: Ensure all interactive and key informational elements have a 'data-testid' attribute for testing.
Follow the 'Swiss Brutalist' styling: use 1px or 2px solid borders (border-border), remove border-radius (rounded-none), and maintain high contrast.
For Attendance and Payment lists, ensure strict alignment and dense spacing.
Bottom navigation and drawer menu should have high contrast active states with hard border separations.
